snippet.title: Dhamaal 4: SAREE MV | Sanju Rathod, Tanishk | Ajay Devgn, Ritiesh Deshmukh, Anjali, Arshad, Jaaved
snippet.description:
Get ready to set the stage with vibes of love! Presenting the highly anticipated song "Saree" from тАЬDhamaal 4тАЭ directed by Indra Kumar starring Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh, Jaaved Jaaferi, Ravi Kishan, Sanjay Mishra, Upendra Limaye, Anjali Anand, Sanjeeda Shaikh & Esha Gupta.

Watch the biggest family entertainer #Dhamaal4 in cinemas worldwide from 10th July!

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present
In Association With Devgn Films
A T-Series Films, Maruti International, Panorama Studios Production

"Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie ****. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

snippet.title: Mother Promise - Trailer 1 | Daali Dhananjaya | Poornachandra Mysore | July 10
snippet.description:
Presenting the official trailer of Mother Promise, a Kannada gangster comedy entertainer directed by Poornachandra Mysore and produced by Daali Pictures. Get ready for a wild ride packed with gangsters, comedy, chaos, and unexpected twists! Mother Promise releases worldwide on July 10.

About the movie : 
Mother Promise is a riotous comedy set in a fictional Bengaluru, where one hapless gambler loses everything and finds himself on the run - dodging two powerful dons, smugglers, dreamers, and misfits, all while his own mother joins the chase. Amid the mayhem, the film celebrates the one promise even the toughest men dare not break.

Movie Credits :

Directed by - Poornachandra Mysore
Produced by - Harsha Murundi Shivalingappa, Dhananjaya Kalenahalli Adaviswamy
Written by - Poornachandra Mysore, Mahadev Prasad, Arun Bharamannavar
Director of Photography - Rahul Roy
Music - Navaneeth Sham
Editor - Pradeep Rao
Art Director - Subbu Hunsur
Costume Designer - Zoha Kabir, Khushi Jagadisha, Inchara Suresh, Dayanand R
Creative Producer - Shashank Soghal
Executive Producer - Yadunandan 
Production Managers - Sudhir K M, Shreesha Gowda
Stunts - Yogananda D C
Choreography - Bhushan
Sound Design - Swastik Karekad
Re Recording Mixer - RJ Rahul
DI - Tom C Jose
Associate Director - Abhishek V
Direction Team - Lokesh Vinay, Gnanesh Mysuru, Prajwal T, Dhanush KR, Rohan Raj K B, Naveen B Mavalli
DOP Team - Sanjay Rajagopal, Nishi, Yogi
Gaffer - Manje Gowda
VFX - Svstudios, Mayukha Studios pvt ltd., Future Age Studio
Racing Animation - Qixotics Creative pvt ltd.
Stills - Akhil
PRO - Pink Tickets
Posters - Lazy Brains
Production Execution & Lead Marketing: Cinemamara
Trailer Editor - Pramodh Sign

Trailer Music Credits:
Arranged: Navaneeth Sham, Nandan Srinivas
Guitars: Vaishak Nalka
Female Vocals: Usha Navaneeth 
Premix: Sandeep Kumar JN
Mixing and Mastering: Sajay Kumar MP @ Renu Film Studio
Subtitles : Nidhi Hegde

Tu Mere Dil Me Aaj Bhi Hai, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai тАФ jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai тЭдя╕П

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.

рдкрд╛рд╡рди рдЧрдВрдЧрд╛ рдЬрд▓ рд╕реЗ рдмрд╛рдмрд╛ рддреБрдо рдХреЛ рдиреЗрд╣рд▓рд╛рдпреЗрдЧреЗ,

snippet.title: GOD STYLE  | YO YO HONEY SINGH | Hommie Dilliwala | Full Video
snippet.description:
Here's  #GodStyle by Yo Yo Honey Singh.
Song : GOD STYLE 
*SINGER : YO YO HONEY SINGH* 
Lyrics: Hommie dilliwala
Music producer: *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Composer : *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Mixed by : *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Mastered by : Hommie Dilliwala
Directed by : Pitch Gray
Executive producer: Passant Shams Ell Dean
Digital Strategy : Rajdeep Mayer
Graphics /Posters : RDM Media
Digital marketing & Campaign : RDM Media and Bull18 

Production house- Tash Films Creations
Line Producer- Aadesh Gola
Unit production manager- Prashant Rohilla
Production Manager- Ashish Moudgil
Makeup (YYHS)- Pallavi Kapoor
Makeup (Feature artist)- Pallavi kapoor and team
Stylist (Yo Yo Honey Singh) - Akanksha Bhakoo
Stylist (Feature Artist)- Tanya Mehrotra
Production Design, Art Direction & Set Execution- Varun Kumar(@beardseyeview) and Rishabh Chadha
Casting - Anil Kumar (Ak Films)

Lyrics :- 

Aya Vijayta 
Khuda ka chaheta 
Yodha hai subhe wo 
Raat ko dracula 
BeatтАЩein hai sajata 
Rokda chabata 
Hater ko nachata 
Karwata bachata 

Kara ni diss abhi Fir bhi ye baithe hai sehem ke 
Duniya kehti yoyo thoda Toh rehem de 

Ikyavan gaane daale 
Jal ke kaale saale 
Chaabi faiki maine 
Muh pe maare taale 

Inke ney gaane lagte 
Jaise puraane 
Music sudharne 
bheja hai khuda ne 

RAP GOD Poori duniya nacha di 
RAP GOD Aesi kismat humarii
RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi 
Im handpicked by uparwala hi 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

Matlabi Matlabi duniya 
Kaale naag ki karwat duniya 
Karti Chal kapat ye duniya 
Jalti har wakat ye duniya 

Zehereela sa sharbat duniya 
Beimaani si barkat duniya 
Be wajah ki harkat duniya 
I dont give a fuck to duniya 

Thaali khali jali bando ki kar daali 
Taali taali maare duniya saari taali 
Kali cadi kare noton ki rakhwali
Aisa dahaada ki duniya hee chaba li 

Bhaagte rapper hai haanfte 
Mootu taezaab inke carrier graph pe
Daily kankalo pe chadh ke naachte 
Nasha bharwane aate humse saanp ye

CHALAVE KYU

Kabhi michael hu kabhi mai heath ledger

RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi

Leher leher..
Behti ho ke saahil se bekhabar
Theher theher..
Kar lamhe kaise bante ye peher

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar

Geela hua jo tera badan
Bheega na jaane kyun mera mann

Yun to ye nazdeekiyan dono ki bewajah bhi hain
Inmein par jitna takalluf hai utna maza bhi hai

Hoti bhala kaise feeke savere ki
Namkeen si dopaher dopaher
Milta humein kaise dil ke veerane mein
Soya hua ek sheher

Leher leher..
Behti ho ke saahil se bekhabar
Theher theher..
Kar lamhe kaise bante ye peher

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agarтАж

Mujhe tujh mein
Tujhe mujh mein
Tanha sa mila humsafar

Aa chhupa loon
Tujhe mujh mein
Milein phir na milein hum agar

Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main

Chaahe tootein sabhi kasmein
Par adhoora koi armaan na rahe

Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agarтАж

Yeh Aankhen Bolti Hain
O Sanam O Sanam

Kaho Na Kaho

snippet.title: GTA5 | Franklin & Shinchan ЁЯПЖ Ronaldo vs Messi vs Neymar Fans! World Cup Celebration
snippet.description:
тЪ╜The FIFA World Cup has started, and LosSantos is full of football celebrations!ЁЯОЙ

Shinchan and his friends want to build a hugeRonaldo cutout.ЁЯРР

Franklin and his team plan to build a giant Messi
cutout.ЁЯРР

Trevor and his friends decide to build a massive Neymar cutout.ЁЯРР

But there's a problem... they don't have enough money!ЁЯШ▒

To earn money quickly, all three teams enter a dangerous ramp challenge with vehicles.ЁЯЪЧЁЯТе
Who will win the challenge and complete their football dream?
Watch till the end to see the giant Ronaldo, Messi, and Neymar cutouts standing together in Los Santos!тЪ╜ЁЯФе

O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja тЭдя╕П | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

тАв Retro Bollywood feel ЁЯОЮя╕П
тАв Emotional aur soulful lyrics ЁЯТФ

тАв Old is gold style romantic vibe тЬи

LIRIK
Berjalan sendirian di jalan tadi malam
Bertemu seorang pria bernama Blue
Dia tersesat dalam cahaya restoran
Aku juga tersesat di sana
Dia menawarkan jendelanya kepadaku
Dia menawarkan tempat tidurnya kepadaku
Aku menolak dan tetap di tempat
Dan inilah yang dia katakan

Hari-hari gelap akan datang
Begitulah kata Alkitab
Kau akan melihat mereka berlari
Ketika langit berubah merah
Aku tahu ada sesuatu
Yang tak bisa kupastikan
Hari-hari gelap akan datang
Jadi kita berhutang lagu ini
Oh...

Ditinggalkan sendirian di kamar hotel
Malam semakin dingin
Begitu terang dalam cahaya berlian
Para malaikat menangis dan bernyanyi
Mereka menawarkan penglihatan mereka kepadaku
Tentang hantu di setiap dinding
Aku menolak dan tetap di tempat
Dan menyaksikan para malaikat jatuh

Hari-hari gelap akan datang
Begitulah kata Alkitab berkata
Kau akan melihat mereka berlari
Saat langit berubah merah
Aku tahu ada sesuatu
Yang tak bisa kupastikan
Hari-hari gelap akan datang
Jadi kita Oh lagu ini
Oh...

Perang dan pelacur
Dan tenggat waktu yang tak pernah terpenuhi
Kisah-kisah melalui pintu
Dalam cerita pengantar tidur yang dibaca
Apa yang dulu kita alami telah berakhir
Dan apa adanya kita telah hilang
Saat aku menatap matamu
Aku tak ingin menyanyikan lagu ini

Hari-hari gelap akan datang
Begitulah kata Alkitab
Kau akan melihat mereka berlari
Saat langit berubah merah
Aku tahu ada sesuatu
Yang tak bisa kupastikan
Hari-hari gelap akan datang
Jadi kita berhutang lagu ini
Oh...

en.description:

--
LYRICS
Walk alone on a road last night
Met a man named Blue
He was lost in a diner light
I was lost there too
He offered me his window
He offered me his bed
I declined and held the line
And this is what he said

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
YouтАЩll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know thereтАЩs something
I canтАЩt put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we owe this song
Oh...

Left alone in a hotel room
The night was turning cool
So bright in a diamond light
The angels cried and crooned
They offered me their vision
Of ghosts in every wall
I declined and held the line
And watched the angels fall

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
YouтАЩll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know thereтАЩs something
I canтАЩt put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we Oh this song
Oh...

Wars and whores
And deadlines never met
Lores through doors
In bedtime stories read
What we were is over
And what we are is gone
When I look in your eyes
I donтАЩt want to sing this song

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
YouтАЩll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know thereтАЩs something
I canтАЩt put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we owe this song
Oh...

de-DE.description:
The Pretty Reckless тАУ тАЮDark DaysтАЬ
Vom neuen Album тАЮDear GodтАЬ | JETZT ERH├ДLTLICH

--
TEXT
Gestern Nacht ging ich allein auf einer Stra├Яe entlang
Da traf ich einen Mann namens Blue
Er war im Licht eines Diners verloren
Ich war dort auch verloren
Er bot mir sein Fenster an
Er bot mir sein Bett an
Ich lehnte ab und blieb in der Leitung
Und das sagte er:

Dunkle Tage kommen
So sagt es die Bibel
Du wirst sie rennen sehen
Wenn der Himmel rot wird
Ich wei├Я, da ist etwas
Ich kann es nicht genau benennen
Dunkle Tage kommen
Deshalb schulden wir dieses Lied
Oh...

Allein in einem Hotelzimmer zur├╝ckgelassen
Die Nacht wurde k├╝hl
So hell im Diamantlicht
Die Engel weinten und sangen
Sie boten mir ihre Vision an
Von Geistern in jeder Wand
Ich lehnte ab und blieb in der Leitung
Und sah zu Engel fallen

Dunkle Tage kommen, so sagt die Bibel.
Du wirst sie rennen sehen,
wenn der Himmel rot wird.
Ich wei├Я, da ist etwas,
das ich nicht benennen kann.
Dunkle Tage kommen,
so schulden wir dieses Lied.
Oh...

Kriege und Huren,
und nie eingehaltene Fristen. Geschichten durch T├╝ren,
die in Gutenachtgeschichten vorgelesen werden.
Was wir waren, ist vorbei.
Und was wir sind, ist vergangen.
Wenn ich in deine Augen schaue,
will ich dieses Lied nicht singen.

Dunkle Tage kommen, so sagt die Bibel.
Du wirst sie rennen sehen,
wenn der Himmel rot wird.
Ich wei├Я, da ist etwas,
das ich nicht benennen kann.
Dunkle Tage kommen,
so schulden wir dieses Lied.
Oh...

snippet.title: Franklin Travels to Korea to Save Jackie Chan! ЁЯШ▒ Blue Cat Mystery | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin and his family travel to South Korea after receiving shocking news that Jackie Chan has suddenly fallen ill. During their visit to a mysterious mountain temple, Shinchan follows a strange blue cat, leading everyone into a dangerous trap.

As the mystery unfolds, Franklin discovers a powerful demon, an ancient magical lamp, and a hidden mastermind controlling everything from the shadows. Can Franklin rescue his family, save Jackie Chan, and defeat the real villain?

ЁЯФе Episode Highlights:
тАв Franklin's Korea Adventure
тАв Jackie Chan Mystery
тАв Blue Cat Trap
тАв Secret Demon
тАв Ancient Korean Temple
тАв Family Rescue Mission
тАв Magical Lamp
тАв Unexpected Villain Twist
тАв Action-Packed GTA 5 Malayalam Story

If you enjoyed this GTA 5 Malayalam adventure, don't forget to LIKE ЁЯСН, SHARE тЭдя╕П and SUBSCRIBE ЁЯФФ for more Franklin & Shinchan roleplay stories.

Franklin and his family travel to South Korea after receiving shocking news that Jackie Chan has suddenly fallen ill. During their visit to a mysterious mountain temple, Shinchan follows a strange blue cat, leading everyone into a dangerous trap.

As the mystery unfolds, Franklin discovers a powerful demon, an ancient magical lamp, and a hidden mastermind controlling everything from the shadows. Can Franklin rescue his family, save Jackie Chan, and defeat the real villain?

ЁЯФе Episode Highlights:
тАв Franklin's Korea Adventure
тАв Jackie Chan Mystery
тАв Blue Cat Trap
тАв Secret Demon
тАв Ancient Korean Temple
тАв Family Rescue Mission
тАв Magical Lamp
тАв Unexpected Villain Twist
тАв Action-Packed GTA 5 Malayalam Story

If you enjoyed this GTA 5 Malayalam adventure, don't forget to LIKE ЁЯСН, SHARE тЭдя╕П and SUBSCRIBE ЁЯФФ for more Franklin & Shinchan roleplay stories.

snippet.title: Sarpanch Title Track | Gulab Sidhu | Dev Kharoud | Avvy Sra | Ohri Productions | Rel 10th July 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting the official Title Track of Sarpanch, featuring powerhouse performances by Dev Kharoud and vocals by Gulab Sidhu.

The song is composed by Avvy Sra with lyrics penned by Jaggi Sanghera, bringing the spirit, pride and energy of Sarpanch to life.

ЁЯОм Sarpanch is releasing worldwide in theatres on July 10, 2026.

тЩк Song Credits
тЦкя╕П Song: Jaan Varda
тЦкя╕П Movie: Sarpanch
тЦкя╕П Singers: Gulab Sidhu
тЦкя╕П Composer & Music: Avvy Sra
тЦкя╕П Lyrics: Jaggi Sanghera

ЁЯОм Movie Credits
Directed By: Mandeep Benipal
Produced By: Vivek Ohri, Sital Singh, Inderjit Singh & Harsimran Singh
Co-Producers: Sanchit Ohri & Navjot Kaur

id.title: 27 Juni 2026 | Prancis vs Norwegia | FIFA World Cup 26 | Sepak Bola Grup WC26 | Gameplay FC26
id.description:
тЬЕ Hai,
Bersiaplah untuk pertandingan sepak bola Piala Dunia 2026 yang penuh aksi saat Prancis ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ melawan Norwegia ЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗ┤ dalam pertandingan Grup WC26 yang mendebarkan ini, yang dihidupkan dengan gameplay EA FC26 yang menakjubkan! Prancis memasuki pertandingan bertegangan tinggi ini dengan talenta elit, kecepatan eksplosif, dan kecemerlangan menyerang, bertujuan untuk mengendalikan pertandingan dengan keterampilan dan ketepatan. Sementara itu, Norwegia datang dengan kekuatan, disiplin, dan serangan balik yang berbahaya, siap untuk menantang setiap peluang dan berjuang untuk poin berharga di babak grup.

тЬЕ Akankah Prancis mendominasi dengan kualitas kelas dunianya, atau bisakah Norwegia mengejutkan semua orang dengan penampilan yang berani? Tonton sampai akhir dan nikmati drama yang terungkap! Jangan lupa untuk Like, Komentar & Subscribe saluran game kami untuk konten gameplay Piala Dunia 2026 FC26 lainnya! Terima kasih semuanya.

snippet.title: Hum Pyaar Hain Tumhare Dildar Hai Tumhare | Akshay Kumar, Karishma | Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya Hai
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Hum Pyaar Hai Tumhare
Singers: Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer
Edit & Gfx: Nadeem Akhtar (Paperboyz Studioz)

Movie Cast & Crew:
Movie: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
Producer: Suneel Darshan
Director: Dharmesh Darshan
Cast: Akshay Kumar, Abhishek Bachchan, Karishma Kapoor

Song Lyrics:
Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Jaan maine bhi pyaar kiya haiHaan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Jaan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai
Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo

There is a friend for little children
Above the bright blue skies
A friend who never changes
Whose love never dies
Unlike our friends by nature
Who change with changing years
This friend is always with us
His name is god alone

Kaise main bhula doon woh beete huye pal
Har lamha sataaye woh gujaraa hua kal
Kaise main bataun yeh mushkil raaz hai
Kal aaye na kabhi jo hai woh aaj hai
Meri jaan paas aa ke bol do
Muskura ke chup na raha karo
Chup na raha karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par mila karo

Aa..

Phoolon ki waadiyan, barfeele raaste
Hain jaan-e-tamanna sab tere vaaste
Phoolon mein hai chubhan
Sardi mein agan hai
Saanson mein raat din
Yeh kaisi jalan hai
He he he he he he he
Ha ha ha ha he he he he
Sard thandi havaaein
Keh rahi hain fizaayein
Yun na jalaa karo
Yun na jalaa karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

#akshaykumar #karismakapoor #haanmainebhipyaarkiya #kumarsanu #alkayagnik #hindisong #90severgreen #90shindisongs #bollywoodsongs
